name: prototype-collab-tools
description: Framework-agnostic, drop-in tools for handing off web prototypes: deep-link navigation and design-authored annotations.

scripts.//build: shared first: the widgets resolve @proto-collab/shared through its exports, which point at dist
scripts.build: npm run build -w @proto-collab/shared && npm run build -w @proto-collab/annotations -w @proto-collab/nav
